name: Jiangsu Pacific Quartz Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Pacific Quartz Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and sale of silicon quartz products in China and internationally. Its products include quartz tubing for lighting; high purity quartz sand; quartz crucibles; and quartz materials for lighting, photovoltaic, fiber optic, semiconductor industries, etc., as well as quartz rods, diffusion tubing with large outer diameter, and various quartz components. The company is based in Lianyungang, China.
